response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile hands-on engineer with 25+ years of experience, including genuinely relevant distributed-systems work (low-latency microservices at millions of requests per second) and early agentic-AI exposure through MCP tooling. However, this is an executive CTO role, and the resume shows an IC-track career with no evidence of senior technical leadership, scaling teams from 10 to 30+, developing leadership layers, or governing outsourced delivery. Production multi-agent AI system ownership, LLM evaluation depth, and regulated fintech experience are also absent or thin (a brief stint at RIDE Capital). He fails most hard requirements for this position despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: 25+ years of broad hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Real high-scale backend experience: low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic
Current exposure to agentic-AI infrastructure and MCP tooling, plus strong testing/craftsmanship discipline
concerns: No engineering leadership track record: no evidence of managing, scaling, or developing teams, which the role requires (10 to 30+ with a leadership layer)
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, LLM selection/fine-tuning, or evaluation methodology experience
Minimal fintech and regulated-environment experience; only ~15 months at RIDE Capital with no credit/payments/compliance depth

key_factors.factor: Thin production agentic-AI and regulated fintech depth
Strong distributed-systems and hands-on engineering breadth
